summary:
GLOBAL CORRUPTION AND SECURITY THREATS: Brandon warns of a severe impending global shaking between 2026 and 2028, highlighting a massive wave of corruption that will be exposed by a new whistleblower similar to Edward Snowden. Brandon notes that this revelation will uncover decades of deeply rooted systemic corruption. Brandon also recounts foiled terrorist plots in London and France, emphasizing that hostile forces have already infiltrated top-tier domestic institutions, including the NSA, Homeland Security, the Pentagon, and local law enforcement. Furthermore, Brandon points out that these sleeper cells often disguise themselves as ordinary neighbors rather than fitting stereotypical terrorist profiles.

GEOPOLITICAL ESCALATIONS AND NEW WORLD ORDER: Brandon describes an imminent escalation in global conflicts, including a regrouping of forces in Iran, Syria, Hezbollah, and Gaza for a nighttime attack. Brandon details Vladimir Putin's ambitions to expand beyond Ukraine into Romania and Poland, alongside political maneuvers by European leaders to deliberately provoke war. These orchestrated global tensions are designed to usher in a one-world government, a unified digital currency system utilizing CBDCs, and a surveillance state monitored by rapidly advancing artificial intelligence, social credit scores, and mandatory digital identification.

THE TRIBULATION AND ANTICHRIST RULE: Brandon details a vivid out-of-body experience from July 6, 2014, where Jesus revealed the realities of the Tribulation. Brandon describes widespread chaos, rampant looting, and the disappearance of all children under the age of fifteen. The Antichrist will enforce a mandatory one-world religion, replacing national flags with a green, white, and black flag featuring Islamic pillars and UN symbols, and forcing citizens to burn Bibles in local stadiums. Brandon explicitly names a newly built Starbucks as a confirmed prophetic sign of this era, warning that advanced technologies like Starlink and Neuralink-style chips will enforce the Mark of the Beast, reducing recipients to heavily surveilled, zombie-like entities unable to harm themselves.

ALIEN DECEPTION AND ENVIRONMENTAL CATASTROPHES: Brandon explains that global authorities will use a staged alien deception involving Nephilim to explain away the mass disappearance of millions of people. Brandon forecasts unprecedented environmental disasters, including extreme weather manipulation, volcanic activity, tsunamis, and the death of all oceanic fish, causing an inescapable stench across the globe. Additionally, Brandon predicts the release of a severe new plague released in Europe, spread by rats, as well as the construction of a Third Temple in Jerusalem where the Antichrist will declare himself God.

PROPHETIC FINANCIAL WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon foresees a massive, supernatural wealth transfer occurring around 2026 to fund specific operations before the global collapse. Brandon predicts sudden surges in digital currencies, precious metals, and foreign exchange, alongside God-inspired, multi-million-dollar inventions and technological breakthroughs. Brandon urges preparation for these extreme financial shifts, noting that individuals will receive sudden wealth and mathematical or scientific formulas through dreams and divine inspiration to survive the approaching times.
